{{Infobox concept
| name = Threshold
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Threshold Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Threshold is a significant [[Abidan]] world that functions as a middle ground between [[Sanctum]] and lower-level [[Iterations]]. Due to its unique position within the [[Way]], it is considered a natural marvel and is vital to the operations of all seven [[Abidan]] Divisions, though the [[Titans]] maintain a specific claim over it. The world serves as a primary filtering location for natural ascendants from lesser [[Iterations]], acting as a first line of defense to protect [[Sanctum]] from potential [[Vroshir]] threats. Upon arrival, individuals are informed that Threshold is a place where mortal ascensions are redirected to help them adjust to [[life]] beyond their original worlds and to allow for the sorting of worthy candidates. [[Adepts]] who have mastered their home energy systems may remain on Threshold or be moved to other worlds where they can be of use. The world contains large cities, such as [[Northgate]], and possesses built-in protective measures capable of preventing atmospheric destruction from massive energy attacks. However, the environment can appear as though it is on the verge of collapse.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Threshold]] is something surpassed at the top of the Tower in Obelisk.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Threshold]] contains silver towers and floating metal boxes the size of buildings.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Threshold]] is the world [[Yerin]] and others are in.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Threshold is a unique [[Iteration]] containing the city of [[Northgate]] and characterized by its barred sky. Serving as an important [[Abidan]] world, it acts as a middle ground between [[Sanctum]] and low-level [[Iterations]]. Because it does not fall within any specific Division, the location remains a tradable entity that functions as the first line of defense against potential [[Vroshir]]. During its history, the [[Reaper]] has hauled himself out of this world, yet [[Cirian]] notably omitted any mention of Threshold from his report.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] is an important [[Abidan]] world that serves as a middle ground between low-level [[Iterations]] and [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] does not fall within any specific Division of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] is the first line of defense between [[Sanctum]] and would-be [[Vroshir]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] is an [[Iteration]] containing the city of [[Northgate]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] has a barred sky.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Reaper]] hauls himself out of [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Threshold]] is a location that can be traded.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]] omitted mention of [[Threshold]] from his report.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
